member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextMessageIds
member.summary: Static class for all SessionContext command Msg IDs supported.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextMessageIds.InstanceMeta
member.summary: Gets the Instance Meta Message id (name, dutId, ipId) - response type - InstanceMeta type.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextMessageIds.CurrentCallingPath
member.summary: Gets the Instance calling path for current execution.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextMessageIds.ConsoleLogLevel
member.summary: Gets the Instance Console log level - response type - type ConsoleService enum.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextMessageIds.Logger
member.summary: Gets the InstanceLogger message id - response type IContextLogger.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextMessageIds.DutContext
member.summary: Gets the DutContext message id - response type PlatformService.IDutContext.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextMessageIds.PerformanceCounterControl
member.summary: Gets the Performance Counter Control message id - response type PerformanceCounterService.CounterControlStorage.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextMessageIds.DebugConsole
member.summary: Gets the Performance Counter Control message id - response type PerformanceCounterService.CounterControlStorage.
